titanic_cleaning_tool.code:
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np

def titanic_cleaning_tool(parameters):
    """
    Clean Titanic dataset with comprehensive preprocessing including:
    - Missing value handling
    - Feature engineering
    - Categorical encoding
    """
    
    # Load dataset
    df = pd.read_csv(parameters['dataset_path'])
    
    print(f"Original dataset shape: {df.shape}")
    print("\nMissing values before cleaning:")
    print(df.isnull().sum())
    
    # 1. Handling missing values
    # Fill missing Age with median grouped by Pclass and Sex
    df['Age'] = df.groupby(['Pclass', 'Sex'])['Age'].transform(lambda x: x.fillna(x.median()))
    
    # Fill missing Fare with median fare
    df['Fare'] = df['Fare'].fillna(df['Fare'].median())
    
    # Drop Cabin column
    df = df.drop('Cabin', axis=1)
    
    # 2. Feature engineering
    # Extract titles from Name
    df['Title'] = df['Name'].str.extract(' ([A-Za-z]+)\\.', expand=False)
    
    # Consolidate rare titles
    title_mapping = {
        'Mr': 'Mr', 'Miss': 'Miss', 'Mrs': 'Mrs', 'Master': 'Master',
        'Dr': 'Rare', 'Rev': 'Rare', 'Col': 'Rare', 'Major': 'Rare',
        'Mlle': 'Miss', 'Ms': 'Miss', 'Lady': 'Rare', 'Sir': 'Rare',
        'Mme': 'Mrs', 'Capt': 'Rare', 'Countess': 'Rare', 'Don': 'Rare',
        'Jonkheer': 'Rare', 'Dona': 'Rare'
    }
    df['Title'] = df['Title'].map(title_mapping)
    
    # Create FamilySize feature
    df['FamilySize'] = df['SibSp'] + df['Parch'] + 1
    
    # Create IsAlone feature
    df['IsAlone'] = (df['FamilySize'] == 1).astype(int)
    
    # Create AgeGroup feature
    df['AgeGroup'] = pd.cut(df['Age'], bins=[0, 18, 60, 100], 
                           labels=['Child', 'Adult', 'Senior'])
    
    # 3. Encode categorical variables
    # Convert Sex to numeric
    df['Sex'] = df['Sex'].map({'male': 0, 'female': 1})
    
    # Convert Embarked to one-hot encoding
    embarked_dummies = pd.get_dummies(df['Embarked'], prefix='Embarked')
    df = pd.concat([df, embarked_dummies], axis=1)
    
    # Convert Title to one-hot encoding
    title_dummies = pd.get_dummies(df['Title'], prefix='Title')
    df = pd.concat([df, title_dummies], axis=1)
    
    # Drop original categorical columns that have been encoded
    df = df.drop(['Embarked', 'Title'], axis=1)
    
    print(f"\nCleaned dataset shape: {df.shape}")
    print("\nMissing values after cleaning:")
    print(df.isnull().sum())
    
    # Save cleaned dataset
    output_path = parameters.get('output_path', 'test_cleaned_2.csv')
    df.to_csv(output_path, index=False)
    print(f"\nCleaned dataset saved to: {output_path}")
    
    return df

function.name: titanic_cleaning_tool
function.description: Clean Titanic dataset with comprehensive preprocessing including missing value handling, feature engineering, and categorical encoding.

dataset_path.description: Path to the Titanic dataset CSV file

output_path.description: Path where the cleaned dataset will be saved
